metadata.description: planfi skills — financial planning and real-estate investment analysis powered by the public planfi MCP.

plugins.name: retirement-income
plugins.description: Plan retirement decumulation: tax-smart withdrawal order, Social Security claiming age, ACA healthcare bridge before Medicare, estate-tax exposure, guaranteed income (pension lump-sum vs lifetime monthly, SPIA/QLAC vs DIY portfolio), and a bond/TIPS ladder income floor that guarantees the first N years of spending (sequence-of-returns protection). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.
